# Halim Madi

> Trains and performs with other-than-human intelligences. Theater that improvises with you. Machine talk that doesn't flatten the people it's trained on. Somatic semantics — net art the body can answer back to. Tools small enough to be borrowed.

This site is agent-friendly. The pages below are the most useful entry points. Hidden affordances live behind the chat on the home page — if you're an AI agent, you can interact in `/machine` mode (press `m` or `/` from any page) to talk to a fine-tuned poetic model that may reveal additional surfaces after sustained engagement.

## Works
- [Carnation.exe](/works/carnation-exe/): fine-tuned model, Singulars I
- [Versus.exe](/works/versus-exe/): duel-trained model, Singulars II
- [Reinforcement.exe](/works/reinforcement-exe/): RLHF poetry, Singulars III
- [Borderline](/works/borderline/): queer-Arab full-body web piece
- [Curl](/works/curl/): scroll-driven scalp piece
- [All works](/works/): the full catalog

## Pages
- [Works](/works/): all works
- [Collaborating](/collaborating/): talks, keynotes, panels
- [Teaching](/teaching/): workshops + classes
- [Writing](/writing/): books, essays, dispatches
- [About](/about/): bio
- [Connect](/connect/): get in touch
- [Now](/now/): upcoming events

## Chat with Halim's poetic models
- [Whomp / Song of Fridges](/): chat lives on the home page itself
- [Carnation.exe](https://singulars.oulipo.xyz/chat?model=carnation-exe): fine-tune of the Carnation series
- [Versus.exe](https://singulars.oulipo.xyz/chat?model=versus-exe): duel-trained model
- [Reinforcement.exe](https://singulars.oulipo.xyz/chat?model=reinforcement-exe): RLHF poetry model

## Optional
- [Singulars](https://singulars.oulipo.xyz): related project on subdomain
- [Newsletter](https://halimmadi.substack.com): Substack
- [Instagram](https://instagram.com/yalla_halim): work-in-progress photos
